topics: Basics of Computer Graphics and Its Applications; Raster Scan and Random Scan Systems; Display Technologies
Overview of CRT, Plasma, OLED, AMOLED, and E-Paper Displays
Output Primitives: Line Drawing Algorithms - DDA, Bresenham's, and Midpoint Circle Generation Algorithm
Filled Area Primitives: Scan Fill, Flood Fill, and Boundary Fill; Inside-Outside Tests
Two-Dimensional Transformations: Translation, Rotation, Scaling, Reflection, and Shearing; Composite Transformations; Matrix Representations and Homogeneous Coordinates
2-D Clipping: Window to Viewport Transformation, Point Clipping, Cohen-Sutherland Line Clipping Algorithm, Sutherland-Hodgeman and Weiler-Atherton Polygon Clipping Algorithms

Three-Dimensional Concepts and Display Methods: Parallel Projection, Perspective Projection, Depth Cueing, Visible Line and Surface Identification, Surface Rendering, Exploded and Cutaway Views, Three-Dimensional and Stereoscopic Views
Three-Dimensional Transformations: Translation, Scaling, Rotation, Viewing Transformation, The Perspective Algorithms
Three-Dimensional Clipping; Perspective View of Cube

Visible Surface Detection Methods: Depth Buffer, A-Buffer, Scan Line, Depth Sorting Methods; Hidden Surface Removal - Back Face Detection, Z-Buffer Method, Painter's Algorithm, Scan-Line Algorithm, BSP Trees, Area Sub-Division Method, Ray Tracing; Animation, Morphing
